10537059.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
10537059.description: A special programme focusing on the delicate issue of the `MeToo' movement and a chance for Alan to show off his broadcasting chops. Also featuring a live performance by Alan's very own mixed vocal harmony group, The Quavers.

10611953.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
10611953.description: Faced with some of the toughest challenges that live television can throw at a man: rancour behind the scenes, a viewer in danger, and a segment on ladies' fashion, Alan calls on `Sidekick' Simon Denton to step up to the plate.
